response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal performances: 'GHOST SWEEPER' (00:00-03:05) and 'ANIMA' (03:05-04:59). 2. Used search tool to find official metadata and lyrics for 'GHOST SWEEPER' (Original Artist: Chie Harada, Composer: Toshiyuki Omori, Lyricist: Satomi Arimori) and 'ANIMA' (Original Artist/Composer: Kegani (LIVE LAB.)). 3. Verified lyrics were complete and formatted for JSON, escaping internal quotes and using newlines.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a birthday performance by Tsunomaki Watame, featuring two songs: 'GHOST SWEEPER' and 'ANIMA'.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame and other performers dance and sing the song 'GHOST SWEEPER' on a city-themed stage with neon lights. Text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
長い髪なびかせて　悩ましげなボディ
この都会をハイヒールで　跳び回れば
Big money coming, yeah!
摩天楼の足下　時代錯誤の罠
血迷った危ない奴らなら　極楽へいかせちゃうわ
大胆な私の業の中　どれでもスキなのをあげる
Bye bye sadness, and find out
行き場のないGhost(あなた)だから…
Bye bye sadness, and find out
私が今　見つけ出して…
Ghost Sweeper
吸引もいいけれど　神通棍はどう？
わがままは許さないわ
逃がせないの　Big money coming, yeah!
コンシャスなドレスから　ゴージャスなライフも
いつだって後からついてくる
それが私のスタイル
クールだと誰かがゆうけれど
必ず幸せをあげる
Bye bye sadness, and find out
行き場のないGhost(あなた)だから…
Bye bye sadness, and find out
私が今　見つけ出して…
Ghost Sweeper
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Letting long hair flow, a teasing body
If I jump around this city in high heels
Big money coming, yeah!
At the foot of the skyscraper, a trap of anachronism
If you're a crazy, dangerous guy, I'll send you to heaven
Among my bold techniques, I'll give you whichever you like
Bye bye sadness, and find out
Because you are a Ghost with nowhere to go...
Bye bye sadness, and find out
I am finding you now...
Ghost Sweeper
Suction is fine, but how about the Divine Power Rod?
I won't allow selfishness
I can't let you escape, Big money coming, yeah!
From a conscious dress to a gorgeous life
It always follows from behind
That is my style
Someone said I'm cool
I will definitely give you happiness
Bye bye sadness, and find out
Because you are a Ghost with nowhere to go...
Bye bye sadness, and find out
I am finding you now...
Ghost Sweeper

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame sings 'ANIMA' on a different city-themed stage. Text indicates the song title and composer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
魂の色は 何色ですか
\“もういっそ 折れたままで\”
捨てるほど 逃げ出すほど 強くないよ ほら もう一度 鼓動高鳴る
何が正しいかなんて わからないけど
形のないものばかりが 大切になって行く
飾らない言葉だけが 強く結ばれてる
また躓いて 転がって それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
深い地の底で一人 扉と鍵を探す
おとぎ話は ほら 泡の様に全部消えて
葛藤 残像だけ 次の頁へ
伸びてく枝葉が分かれて それぞれの道を行く
寂しい思い出だけが 強く根を張ってる
また貫いて失って それでも挫けない
心はどこに 器はどこに
ただ残されて抜け落ちて それでも伝えたいよ
魂の日々を 魂の意志を ずっと ずっと
魂の色は 何色ですか
赤い色ですか 青い色ですか
魂の色は 魂の色は 何色ですか 何色ですか
透明な過去に 不透明な明日に 生きるあなたは 何色ですか
また躓いて 転がって それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color is your soul?
"It's better to just stay broken"
I'm not strong enough to throw it away or run away
Look, my heart is racing once again
I don't know what is correct
But only formless things
Are becoming precious
Only unadorned words
Are strongly bound together
I trip and roll over again
But even so, I won't break
What color is your soul?
I'm just hurt and acting tough
But even so, I want to find it
I am verifying the shape of my soul
Alone at the bottom of the deep earth, I look for the door and key
Look, the fairy tale has disappeared completely like bubbles
Only conflicts and afterimages remain, onto the next page
The growing branches and leaves part ways, following their own paths
Only lonely memories
Are strongly taking root
I pierce through and lose again
But even so, I won't be discouraged
Where is my heart? Where is the vessel?
I'm just left behind and falling out
But even so, I want to convey it
The days of my soul, the will of my soul, always, always
What color is your soul?
Is it red? Is it blue?
What color is your soul? What color is your soul?
Living in a transparent past and an opaque tomorrow
What color are you?
I trip and roll over again
But even so, I won't break
What color is your soul?
I'm just hurt and acting tough
But even so, I want to find it
I am verifying the shape of my soul
